description_long: This is a single-tier round cake with a thick, crumbly brown base resembling a cookie or biscuit crust. The cake is generously topped with a swirl of white buttercream icing, adorned with colorful confetti sprinkles and chocolate shavings. Four large, oval-shaped chocolate eggs with a speckled texture are arranged in a cluster at the center, giving the cake a festive and playful appearance. The icing is piped high, creating a voluminous, fluffy look, and the sprinkles add a touch of color and texture. The overall presentation is whimsical and celebratory, suitable for special occasions or festive urban gatherings. The cake sits directly on its base with no visible plate or tray beneath it.
description: A round, single-tier cake with white buttercream icing, colorful sprinkles, chocolate shavings, and four speckled chocolate eggs on top. The base appears to be a thick, crumbly cookie crust.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cake's thick brown base, white icing with sprinkles, and four chocolate eggs clustered on top.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the central placement of the chocolate eggs and the dense layer of chocolate shavings on the icing.
description_view_2: The cake's side is more visible, showing the swirl of icing and the colorful sprinkles, with the eggs slightly offset.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the height of the icing and the arrangement of the eggs, with fewer sprinkles visible on this side.
